name: Salad Nicoise
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil. Add green beans and cook until tender crisp, about 2-3 minutes. Drain and refresh with cold water. Dry.
2. In a large pot of boiling water, bring potatoes to a boil. Cook until tender, about 8 minutes.
3. Combine cooked green beans, potatoes, tuna, and tomatoes in a large bowl.
4. In a small bowl, whisk together mustard, garlic, and vinegar. Slowly add oil, then parsley and chives. Season with pepper. Pour over the ingredients.
5. Top with sliced eggs, anchovy fillets (if using), and additional sliced eggs.
